For additional context about technologies to be used, project structure,
shell commands, and other important information, read the current plan:
[specs/001-frontend-app/plan.md](../specs/001-frontend-app/plan.md)

Active feature: **Tic-Tac-Toe Frontend Application** (branch `001-frontend-app`).
Stack: React 19 + Vite 6 + TypeScript 5.5 (strict) + TanStack Query 5
(1 s polling) + React Router 7 + Tailwind CSS 4. Tests: Vitest +
Testing Library + MSW + Playwright. See the plan for full details
and linked artifacts (research.md, data-model.md, contracts/, quickstart.md).
